name: Chunky Beef Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cooked roast beef into pieces that are about 1/2 to 1 inch.
2. Mix milk and flour; stir in eggs.
3. Combine self-rising flour, salt, and pepper.
4. Dip beef chunks in egg mixture and then dredge in flour mixture.
5. Fry in hot deep fat until browned and heated through.
6. Drain on absorbent paper towels and serve hot.
NOTE:
Serve in a divided serving dish surrounded by pickles, cherry tomatoes, green pepper rings, carrot curls, celery sticks, and parsley, as desired.
